paper.title: Utilization of Rice Husk Ash as viscosity modifying agent in Self Compacting Concrete
paper.authors: Shazim Ali Memon; Muhammad Ali Shaikh; Hassan Akbar

evidence.evidence_text: Mix table lists water, cement, RHA, fine aggregate, coarse aggregate, admixture dosages and water/binder ratio.
Test results table lists compressive strength at 7 days and 28 days in MPa for each mix.
Compressive strength of cylinders at 7 and 28 days was carried out according to ASTM C39.
